The minimum number of nights between raids.
megacolonies.config.minimumrailstopath.c: Minimum number of consecutive rails for citizens to use them.
megacolonies.config.minthleveltoteleport: The minimum level a Town Hall has to be to allow teleportation to allied colonies.
megacolonies.config.neighborbuildingrang: How close a building needs to be to another to be considered a neighbor, in blocks. -1 = intersecting, 0 = touching
megacolonies.config.neighborbuildingrend: By default, when placing a schematic near other buildings, the already-placed buildings will show as if they were at level 5 and have a blue outline around them. You can disable that by setting this to false.
megacolonies.config.nosupplyplacementres: Disables supply camp placing restrictions, intended for skyworlds and similar
megacolonies.config.numberofattemptsfors: Number of Attempts for Safe TP
Amount of attempts to find a safe random teleport (with /mc rtp).
megacolonies.config.officersreceiveadvan: Should officers of a colony receive advancements from that colony?
Max amount of nodes (positions) to map during pathfinding. Lowering increases performance, but might lead to pathing glitches.
megacolonies.config.pathfindingmaxthread: Amount of additional threads to be used for pathfinding.
megacolonies.config.permissioneventbypas: Disables colony permissions if player has a given permission level.
megacolonies.config.pvp_mode.comment: Turn on MegaColonies PVP mode (colonies can be destroyed and griefed under certain conditions).
megacolonies.config.raidersbreakblocks.c: Whether or not raiders are able to break through blocks
megacolonies.config.raidersbreakdoors.co: Whether or not raiders can break through doors.
megacolonies.config.requestsystem.commen: All configurations related to the request system
megacolonies.config.research.comment: All configurations related to the research system
megacolonies.config.researchcreativecomp: Allows automatic and (near) instant completion of research for players in creative mode. If false, creative players will still be able to begin researches, but will have normal progress rates.
megacolonies.config.researchdebuglog.com: Significantly increases the amount of information related to research datapacks that is logged during the world load.
megacolonies.config.researchresetcost: Cost to Undo a Completed Research
megacolonies.config.researchresetcost.co: A list of items to charge players when undoing an already-completed research.
megacolonies.config.restrictcolonyplacem: Should the min/max distance from spawn also affect colony placement?
megacolonies.config.secondsbetweenpermis: Seconds between each permission message (to reduce spam).
megacolonies.config.sendenteringleavingm: Should players be sent entering/leaving colony notifications?
megacolonies.config.showdyetooltips: Show Dye Color tooltips for Leather Items
megacolonies.config.showdyetooltips.comm: When true, dyed leather items will show a tooltip so that you know what color to use.
megacolonies.config.siftableblocks.comme: List of materials a Sifter can rifle through for resources.
megacolonies.config.sifterdrops.comment: List of materials a sifter can find from raw materials, as well as their weights.
megacolonies.config.siftermeshes.comment: List of materials a sifter can use as a mesh material, along with bonus weights
megacolonies.config.skyraiders: Enable raiders to spawn in the sky
megacolonies.config.skyraiders.comment: Raiders will spawn in the sky if this is enabled
megacolonies.config.specialpermgroup.com: Players who have special permissions, especially to change citizen names (see "Name Changes" above).
megacolonies.config.suggestbuildtoolplac: Suggest build tool usage when trying to place a building without the build tool.
megacolonies.config.turnoffexplosionsinc: Independent from the colony protection, should explosions be turned off inside colonies? DAMAGE_NOTHING prevents explosions completely. DAMAGE_PLAYERS, allows explosions to damage players and hostile mobs, but not blocks or neutral or friendly mobs. DAMAGE_ENTITIES allows damage to all entities. DAMAGE_EVERYTHING allows explosions to damage entities and blocks.
megacolonies.config.updaterate.comment: AI Update rate. Increase this to improve performance. This throttles citizen updates.
megacolonies.config.workersalwaysworkinr: Should workers work during the rain?
megacolonies.scroll.failed1: The unstable magic of the scroll backfired!
megacolonies.scroll.failed3: This scroll needs to go back to the drawing board!
megacolonies.scroll.failed4: This scroll doesn't seem to be made by the best magician out there!
megacolonies.scroll.failed6: Looks like there's a typo in one of the ancient glyphs!
megacolonies.scroll.failed7: Did my creator copy the wrong rune again?!
megacolonies.scroll.failed8: Wasn't this supposed to do something?
megacolonies.scroll.needcolony: Please register this scroll to a colony first by sneaking + right-clicking it on a colony building.
megacolonies.scroll.noguardbuilding: Please register this scroll to a Guard or Barracks Tower first by sneaking + right-clicking it on the hut block.
megacolonies.scroll.nopermission: You do not have the required permissions for this colony.
megacolonies.scroll.wrongdim: This scroll can only be used in the same dimension as the colony.
megamod:alchemist.job.desc: Brews Potions, plants Netherwart and harvests Mistletoes
megamod:alchemist.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance and working speed.
megamod:baker.job.desc: Handles all wheat-based recipes. Knows some special bread recipes.
megamod:baker.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance and crafting speed.
megamod:beekeeper.skills.desc: Affects working speed and bee retaliation chance.
megamod:blacksmith.job.desc: Provides the colony with most tools, armor, and weapons.
megamod:blacksmith.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance and working speed.
megamod:chickenherder.job.desc: Gathers eggs, feathers, and other chicken products.
megamod:chickenherder.skills.desc: Affects chance they succesfully pickup chicken byproducts and the chance to land a hit on a chicken.
megamod:composter.job.desc: Composts a lot of the colony waste products
megamod:concretemixer.job.desc: Creates concrete powder and actual concrete.
megamod:concretemixer.skills.desc: Affects concrete harvesting and crafting speed.
megamod:cook.job.desc: Handles most of the cooking and hands out food to citizens.
megamod:cookassistant.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance and working speed.
megamod:cowboy.job.desc: Milks and breeds cows to get milk, leather, and raw beef.
megamod:cowboy.skills.desc: Affects working speed and the damage they deal.
megamod:crusher.job.desc: Crushes cobble to gravel, gravel to sand, and sand to clay.
megamod:crusher.skills.desc: Affects working speed and chance to get sick.
megamod:deliveryman.job.desc: Delivers requested items and blocks to players and citizens.
megamod:deliveryman.skills.desc: Affects walking speed and concurrent request fulfillment capacity.
megamod:druid.job.desc: Support type unit. Buffs friendlies and nerfs enemies.
megamod:dyer.job.desc: Handles most of the dyeing that is required in the colony.
megamod:dyer.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance and working speed.
megamod:enchanter.job.desc: Gathers mana by observing others. Enchants citizen tools and creates enchanting books.
megamod:enchanter.skills.desc: Affects working speed and chance to obtain good enchantments.
megamod:farmer.job.desc: Farms a large variety of crops at up 5 fields.
megamod:farmer.skills.desc: Affects speed at which the farmer works.
megamod:fisherman.job.desc: Spends most of the time fishing at a pond, river or lake.
megamod:fletcher.job.desc: Handles leather, string and wool based recipes.
megamod:fletcher.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance and working speed.
megamod:florist.job.desc: Plants a large variety of flowers for the colony.
megamod:florist.skills.desc: Affects chance to harvest flowers successfully and flower growth time.
megamod:glassblower.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance, crafting speed and smelting speed.
megamod:healer.job.desc: Heals wounded entities and provides cures for the sick.
megamod:healer.skills.desc: Affects working speed and miraculous healing chance.
megamod:knight.job.desc: Close-quarter fighter. High resilience, low damage output.
megamod:knight.skills.desc: Affects health, resilience, and attack speed.
megamod:lumberjack.job.desc: Cuts down trees and replants them based on the configured specifications.
megamod:mechanic.job.desc: Handles redstone recipes and things other workers can't handle.
megamod:mechanic.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance and working speed.
megamod:miner.job.desc: Mines out a shaft system under the colony, gathering blocks and ores. Can be a dangerous job.
megamod:netherworker.job.desc: Wanders into the Nether to gather a wide range of materials. A very dangerous job!.
megamod:netherworker.skills.desc: Affects the survival chances and loot.
megamod:planter.job.desc: Provides sugar cane, cactus, and bamboo to the colony.
megamod:planter.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance, working, and crafting speed.
megamod:pupil.job.desc: Sits around and learns from the material provided by the teacher.
megamod:quarrier.job.desc: Requires a Quarry building to mine a large hole. Safe job, but mostly returns common resources.
megamod:rabbitherder.skills.desc: Affects working speed and chance to hit a rabbit.
megamod:ranger.job.desc: Distance fighter, deals high damage, but has low survival chance in close combat.
megamod:ranger.skills.desc: Affects speed, accuracy, range, and damage output.
megamod:researcher.job.desc: Researches the topics the player selects.
megamod:researcher.skills.desc: Affects offline time researchers can leverage.
megamod:sawmill.job.desc: Provides the colony with most wood based items.
megamod:sawmill.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance and working speed.
megamod:shepherd.job.desc: Shears sheep and controls the size of the flock.
megamod:shepherd.skills.desc: Affects amount of wool they obtain and the damage they deal.
megamod:sifter.job.desc: Sifts through a variety of materials to find goodies.
megamod:sifter.skills.desc: Affects working speed and chance to obtain items.
megamod:smelter.job.desc: Breaks ore blocks into raw ore and smelts raw ores into ingots.
megamod:smelter.skills.desc: Affects smelting/working speed and chance of multiplying ore.
megamod:stonemason.skills.desc: Affects recipe improvement chance and working speed.
megamod:stonesmeltery.job.desc: Provides the stone variants that require smelting and charcoal
megamod:stonesmeltery.skills.desc: Affects working speed and smelting speed.
megamod:student.job.desc: Reads books to increase their intelligence. High intelligence allows learning other skills faster.
megamod:swineherder.skills.desc: Affects working speed and the damage they deal.
megamod:teacher.job.desc: Sits with the kids and provides material.
megamod:teacher.skills.desc: Affects speed at which pupils learn.
megamod:undertaker.job.desc: Digs up citizens graves to get their items, with a chance to resurrect them.
megamod:undertaker.skills.desc: Affects working speed and resurrection chance.
